name: Vegetable Dip
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Ultra light (Fat Free in US) sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Refrigerate at least 2 hours prior to serving to allow the flavors to blend.
3. Use carrot and celery sticks, zucchini slices or sticks, cucumber slices, broccoli and cauliflower florets, cherry tomatoes and any other variety of vegetables you desire.
